Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
with open\('/mnt/c/wamp64_3.3.4/www/projects/peekaboo/resources/views/public/home.blade.php', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

old_start = '<!-- ========== TESTIMONIALS SECTION ========== -->'
old_end = '<!-- Testimonials Section End -->'
i1 = content.index\(old_start\)
i2 = content.index\(old_end\) + len\(old_end\)

with open\('/tmp/testi_new.txt', 'r'\) as f:
    new_block = f.read\(\)

new_content = content[:i1] + new_block + content[i2:]

with open\('/mnt/c/wamp64_3.3.4/www/projects/peekaboo/resources/views/public/home.blade.php', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(new_content\)

print\(f"Done. Old block: {i2-i1} chars. New block: {len\(new_block\)} chars."\)
EOF)

from PIL import Image

for img in imgs:
    try:
        i = Image.open\(base + img\)

    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'{img}: ERROR {e}'\)
